positive: A majestic, bioluminescent stag standing in a misty, enchanted forest clearing. The stag has glowing antlers branching with stylized, abstract geometric light patterns. It is surrounded by large, stylized foliage with dramatic, high-contrast silhouettes. The scene utilizes a palette of deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted with vibrant neon cyan and gold accents for the light sources. Overhead, subtle constellations are visible through the mist. Highly detailed vector art style, clean lines, flat design principles mixed with ethereal realism, perfect central composition, suitable for screen printing on t-shirts. Minimal grain, high saturation, dramatic rim lighting, centered subject, fantasy woodland aesthetic.
negative: blur, low quality, artifacts, watermark, text, dirty, noisy, poor composition, amateur, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature, logo, writing, copyright, cartoon, photorealistic, gradients, grain
